title: PitCast Project File (v1)
description: Canonical schema for `.pitcast` and `.pitcastz` (gzipped) project files emitted by PitCast (pitcast.austenite.org). Matches the file format documented in PLAN-tier3.md Gap G4. Conforms to JSON Schema 2020-12 (IETF draft-bhutton-json-schema-01).

$schema.description: URI of this schema. Fixed for the v1 file format.

format.description: Magic value identifying this as a PitCast project file. Used by importers to refuse non-PitCast JSON.

format_version.description: Semver string for forward-compatibility. Major bump = breaking schema change.

project_id.description: ULID (Crockford base32, 26 chars, lexicographically sortable). Stable for the lifetime of the project; fork imports always receive a new ULID.

created_utc.description: RFC 3339 / ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of project creation.

modified_utc.description: RFC 3339 / ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the most-recent modification (any header change, calculation append, audit append, or attachment).

owner.description: First-run-modal user identity. v1 stores name + initials in plaintext; v2 will add an ECDSA keypair binding.

pe_stamp.description: Reserved for a future P.E.-license binding. Null in v1.

asset.description: The physical asset under assessment (vessel / pipeline / tank / HEX / other).

type.description: Asset family. Drives which engines are surfaced in the UI.

material_uns.description: UNS number of the construction material (e.g. S31803). Empty string if unknown.

service.description: Service conditions. All fields optional; engines fail loud when required values are missing.

stress_x_YS.description: Applied stress as fraction of yield

calculations.description: Append-only ordered list of calculation snapshots. Each captures one engine invocation: inputs, outputs, module identity, and timestamp. The audit_chain is the authoritative history; calculations are derivable by replay.

audit_chain.description: Append-only SHA-256 hash chain (NIST SP 800-53 AU-10, IEC 62443-3-3 SR 2.8-2.12). Each entry binds the prior entry's hash; tampering with any past entry breaks every downstream hash. The head hash is embedded in exported PDFs to provide an external anchor (Certificate Transparency pattern).

attachments.description: List of attached binary blobs (MTCs, ILI runs, NDE reports, photographs). Each entry stores metadata only; the binary payload lives either in browser IndexedDB (ref) or inlined as base64 in `attachments_inline` for self-contained exports.

attachments_inline.description: Optional map of attachment-id -> { mime, data_b64 }. Present in exported files so the .pitcast / .pitcastz is self-contained. NOT present in the live IndexedDB record (blobs live in the attachments object store).

calculation.description: Single engine invocation snapshot. `module` identifies the PitCast engine (e.g. 'PitCast.assess', 'PitCast.couple', 'PitCast.co2', 'B31G.assess'). `inputs` and `outputs` are free-form per-engine — schema kept open intentionally.

module.description: Dotted module path that produced this snapshot.

inputs.description: Engine inputs as captured at calculation time. Free-form per engine.

outputs.description: Engine outputs returned to the user. Free-form per engine.

seq.description: Optional per-project monotonic sequence number assigned by the storage layer.

warnings.description: Soft diagnostics surfaced to the user (e.g. AccuracyBounds out-of-range, missing optional input).

validation_tier.description: Validation hierarchy tier per ASME V&V 10 §4 (Gap G5).

audit_entry.description: Single hash-chained audit-trail entry. Every state-changing action emits one of these. `prev_hash` and `hash` together form the tamper-evident binding per Haber & Stornetta 1991.

seq.description: Monotonically increasing per-project sequence number, starting at 0.

user.description: User initials (from first-run modal). Empty string allowed for system entries.

action.description: Action verb (snake_case). Canonical values include: create_project, rename_project, set_input, run_calculation, attach_blob, fork_import, imported_audit, pe_stamp_request.

path.description: Dotted path of the changed field (e.g. asset.service.T_C). Empty for whole-project actions.

before.description: Prior value (null for create / append actions).

prev_hash.description: Hash of the prior entry; 64 hex zeros for the genesis entry.

hash.description: SHA-256 of the RFC 8785-canonicalized entry (excluding the hash field itself, per audit.js).

fork_of_project_id.description: Set on imported-fork audit entries. Original project_id from the source .pitcast file.

fork_of_audit_head_hash.description: Set on imported-fork audit entries. The head hash of the imported source chain (anchors the source chain inside the fork).

attachment.description: Reference to a binary attachment. The binary payload itself is NOT inlined here; it lives in IndexedDB under the `attachments` object store, or in `attachments_inline` on exported files.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the binary payload as stored.

ref.description: Reference URI for the live IndexedDB blob.
